steps.title: Join two complete clauses
steps.content: The first clause says Metamorphoses dates back to the 1st century. The second says the poem's heroic narrative still captivates modern readers. These are independent clauses with a contrast between age and continuing appeal.

steps.title: Use comma plus yet
steps.content: A leaves the clauses run together without punctuation or a conjunction. C creates a comma splice. D places the comma after yet, breaking the standard comma-plus-coordinating-conjunction pattern. The grammatically correct contrast uses a comma before yet. The answer is B.
